artifact_role: Hourly-updatable register for bounded defense of branch-local recovery no-gos. It changes no claim status or verdict.
history_conflict_rule: If the same obstruction was previously cleared for the same frozen construction, stop with INTEGRITY_CONFLICT and reconcile the premises before banking or defending the new no-go.
selection_rule: Work the highest-information pending history audit and continue into Swing 1 in the same run when no integrity conflict appears and capacity remains. Complete Swing 1 for every newly admitted no-go before spending a second rescue swing on one target, unless a Swing-1 result exposes a cheap decisive test that would moot the others.
resume_rule: After the conditional unitarity certificate reaches an endpoint, resume Swing 2 and Swing 3 for every non-exhausted no-go target.
stop_rule: Accept construction-class exhaustion only after the predeclared space has been tested and any survivor has faced an adversarial twin. A legitimate reframe must explain more, not merely survive.
preservation_rule: A new survivor does not erase the original branch-local no-go. It creates a separately frozen construction candidate.

targets.title: Exact-vacuum GR residual under the W229 record-current branch

boundary-conditioned adapter response supplied as an explicit assumption
standard Einstein dynamics as comparator only, never imported as GU dynamics

conditional_unitarity.question: Given a precisely typed boundary adapter and favorable branch inputs, is the adapter sufficient for the frozen GU construction to produce a positive physical state space and unitary or state-preserving dynamics without further sector-specific imports?
